name: Hudson Soft
description: Japanese developer and publisher known for Bomberman, Adventure Island, PC Engine support, and early console multiplayer games.

eras.title: Microcomputer Origins
eras.description: Early software and computer period before Hudson became a major console name.

eras.title: Famicom and PC Engine Era
eras.description: Hudson's strongest console period, led by Bomberman, Adventure Island, and close ties to the PC Engine.

eras.title: Late Independence
eras.description: Later period of sequels, licensed work, and gradual absorption into Konami.

notes: The Hudson brand and catalogue are now controlled by Konami.
